nasb.text: Joshua the son of Nun and Caleb the son of Jephunneh, of those who had spied out the land, tore their clothes;

esv.text: And Joshua the son of Nun and Caleb the son of Jephunneh, who were among those who had spied out the land, tore their clothes

cnv.text: 窺探那地的人中，有嫩的兒子約書亞和耶孚尼的兒子迦勒；他們撕裂衣服，

ccb.text: 打探迦南的人中，嫩的儿子约书亚和耶孚尼的儿子迦勒撕裂衣服，
